title: Compliance: crypto/edhoc.py OSCORE
description: Policy: 06-security.md §8.7 and §8.8. File: python/src/lichen/crypto/edhoc.py. Status: COMPLIANT. Full EDHOC RFC 9528 Suite 0 implementation. EdhocInitiator and EdhocResponder classes with X25519 + Ed25519 + AES-CCM. export_oscore() derives master secret/salt per RFC 9528 Section 7.2.1.
